S1.note: Stripe created sub correctly with 7-day trial; metadata.userId set. App-side webhook never received the customer.subscription.created event (root cause: TIM-2735 — see blockers). Supabase users + subscriptions tables therefore not updated. DB checks all fail solely because of the webhook regression, not because of any app-layer trial logic.

S2.note: Test clocks advanced cleanly Stripe-side. Dashboard banner copy depends on users.trial_ends_at, which the webhook never wrote — so the banner cannot be validated end-to-end. TrialBanner UI logic itself was verified previously via direct DB-seed (scripts/tim1903-prod-verify.mjs) and remains correct.

S3.note: Post-conversion Pro-lock check depends on S5 successful conversion (users.subscription_tier=starter, subscription_status=active). Webhook regression means tier stays 'free' (default), so the lock screen test is not a fair test of the lock logic.

checks.email_delivery_blocked_by: RESEND_API_KEY missing in prod Vercel env

S4.note: Cron endpoint accepts CRON_SECRET and runs the selector. Selector did not find candidates because the QA users' trial_ends_at was never written (S1 webhook regression chain). Even if candidates were found, sendTrialReminderEmail returns {ok:false,skipped:true,reason:'no_api_key'} — verified in src/lib/email/trial-reminders.ts:271. Two upstreams must land before this is testable: TIM-2735 (webhook restore) AND TIM-2366 (Resend).

S5.note: Stripe-side conversion 100% correct: $39 charged, sub becomes active. App-side: webhook for invoice.paid / customer.subscription.updated never landed, so users.ai_credits_remaining stayed 0 and tier stayed 'free' — no monthly grant, no Welcome toast trigger, no banner change.

S6.note: Stripe-side cancel-during-trial: PERFECT. cancel_at_period_end=true → sub auto-cancels at trial_end with ZERO charges. App-side access revocation (which keys off webhook-driven users.subscription_status=canceled) cannot be verified because customer.subscription.deleted webhook never landed.

S7.note: Stripe-side dunning: confirmed Day-7 charge attempt failed (card_declined), sub went past_due. App-side dunning banner ("Update your payment method") + 3-day grace + Day-10 read-only logic cannot be tested because invoice.payment_failed / customer.subscription.updated webhooks never landed.

checks.checkout_endpoint_rejects_growth_410: verified via code review (src/app/api/stripe/create-checkout-session/route.ts:23-28 returns 410 with 'The Growth plan was retired — choose Starter or Pro.')

S8.note: Rendered /pricing on prod has zero 'Growth' references. Checkout endpoint hard-rejects growth_* planKeys with 410. PASS. Note: Stripe test catalog still has Groundwork Growth products (prod_UWmzUP2zI62p0S, prod_UWmskWFzRgdD5V) — orphan products not surfaced in UI, harmless. Worth a follow-up Stripe-catalog cleanup but not a S8 fail.

blockers.summary: Stripe test-mode webhook endpoint not configured → ALL Stripe events drop on the floor
blockers.rootCause: Stripe Dashboard test-mode webhook endpoint list is EMPTY (GET /v1/webhook_endpoints returns data:[]). Last processed Stripe event in stripe_processed_events table is dated 2026-06-03; nothing since. Prod env STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (ends ...0d4dfa104bd) is orphaned — points to an endpoint that was deleted or never re-created after a Stripe Dashboard config change.
blockers.scope: Affects every Stripe → app webhook handler path: customer.subscription.created/updated/deleted, invoice.paid/payment_failed, checkout.session.completed. Test-mode signups via /pricing → Stripe Checkout → return to app would land the user on /account/billing?success=1 with NO subscriptions row written.
blockers.userImpact: ZERO real users affected since 2026-06-03 (no non-QA user signups in that window — verified). But ANY new signup attempt right now silently breaks: Stripe customer created, no app-side state written.
blockers.fix: Board (or whoever owns Stripe Dashboard) needs to: (1) Re-create test-mode webhook endpoint pointing to https://groundwork.cafe/api/stripe/webhook with the events used by src/app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts; (2) Update prod Vercel env STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the new endpoint's whsec_*. As CTO I have stripe API write access (can create endpoints) but cannot update Vercel env vars (board-only).

blockers.summary: Resend prod provisioning + 11 transactional templates — currently in_review (PR #152)
blockers.impact: S4 trial-end emails (Day 5 / 7 / 8) cannot deliver. App-side cron + selector + render are all correct (verified via code review); sendTrialReminderEmail short-circuits with no_api_key.
blockers.fix: Land PR #152 + set RESEND_API_KEY in prod Vercel env.

cleanup.stripe_temporary_webhook_endpoint_delete: we_1TjgUTCzwciIL0hnInCJvNhj (created during diagnosis, deleted to keep state clean)

summary.verdict: INCOMPLETE — Stripe billing logic + UI surfaces (S8) confirmed correct. End-to-end DB / dashboard / email verification blocked on two platform regressions: (1) test-mode webhook endpoint not configured [TIM-2735 to file], (2) Resend prod env [TIM-2366 in_review]. Once both land, all 7 scenarios re-runnable in ~15 min via scripts/tim2734-qa-harness.mjs.
